note: Mock pLDDT scores derived from AlphaFold2 confidence estimates for these domains. Replace by running BoltzRunner with use_mock=False on a GPU node.

titin__Z_disk_Ig.note: Ig-fold; well-packed beta-sandwich, high confidence expected

titin__N2B_unique.note: Intrinsically disordered elastic element; very low pLDDT is correct

titin__PEVK.note: Proline-glutamate-valine-lysine repeat; IDP region, low pLDDT expected

titin__A_band_FnIII.note: Fibronectin type-III repeat; beta-sandwich fold, moderate-high confidence

titin__M_line_kinase.note: Serine/threonine kinase domain; bilobal fold, confident in core

myosin_heavy_chain__motor_domain.note: Well-characterised motor head; extensive structural data (PDB: 2MYS)

myosin_heavy_chain__lever_arm.note: Single alpha-helix; near-perfect confidence for short helical segments

myosin_heavy_chain__rod_domain.note: Coiled-coil; repetitive sequence reduces per-residue confidence slightly

actin__actin_monomer.note: Highly conserved globular fold; top-tier confidence (PDB: 1ATN)

troponin_i__inhibitory_region.note: Short inhibitory helix; confidence improves significantly in complex with TnC

troponin_c__n_lobe.note: EF-hand Ca2+ sensor; well-defined helix-loop-helix motif

troponin_c__c_lobe.note: Structural EF-hand; constitutively Ca2+-bound, higher confidence than n_lobe
